papers.title: Ileal microbial microbiome and its secondary bile acids modulate susceptibility to nonalcoholic steatohepatitis in dairy goats
papers.authors: Wang Y, Chen X, Huws SA, Xu G, Li J, Ren J, et al.
papers.abstract: BACKGROUND: Liver damage from nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) presents a significant challenge to the health and productivity of ruminants. This study revealed the roles of ileal microbiome and its secondary BAs in resilience and susceptibility to NASH by affecting the hepatic Treg and Th17 cells proportion in dairy goats. Bacterial UDCA, isoDCA and isoLCA were demonstrated to alleviate NASH and could be novel postbiotics to modulate and improve liver health in ruminants.
papers.title_cn: 微生物群塑造生命早期中枢神经系统髓鞘形成
papers.abstract_cn: 背景：非酒精性脂肪性肝炎（NASH）引起的肝损伤对反刍动物健康和生产性能构成重大挑战。本研究揭示了回肠微生物组及其次级胆汁酸通过影响奶山羊肝脏Treg和Th17细胞比例，在NASH易感性与耐受性中的作用。细菌来源的UDCA、isoDCA和isoLCA被证实可缓解NASH，有望成为调控和改善反刍动物肝脏健康的新型后生元。
